series_metadata.series_title: Answer Sheets for Private Inv & Security Guards
series_metadata.series_description: File contains answer sheets from exams that were given to private investigators/security guards to obtain license in their profession of work. These records were under the jurisdication of the Department of Commerce until July 1, 2004 (Series Authorization #800-0256).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain records on the computer database until superseded by new information or until record series in no longer exists, then destroy by erasure. ; Paper: Retain in operating area three (3) months, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
